creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Note that it's not entirely clear what the real world impact is.  The Red Hat CVE-2015-5957 tracking bug (https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=CVE-2015-5957) just notes it as an "unspecified buffer overflow flaw" and the actual bug for the update has the upstream reporter recommending the fix but without any substantiation of the impact (https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1215295).
